---
title: "Assistant Professor Geography Previous Year Questions"
subtitle: "Practice papers for Assistant Professor (Geography) exams"
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
---

{{< include pyq-assistant-professor/rpsc2021_geo1.md >}}
